label: Multimodal assistants & vision-language systems

node.label: Multimodal assistants & vision-language systems
node.definition: Multimodal assistants interpret and generate across text, images, audio, video, documents, screens, or sensor streams within one interaction.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Multimodal assistants & vision-language systems is modeled as depending on Multimodal foundation models, Retrieval-augmented generation and feeding downstream nodes such as Tutoring, translation & knowledge work.
examples: atlas downstream link to Tutoring, translation & knowledge work
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Multimodal foundation models, Retrieval-augmented generation.
